diff:
diff --git a/src/domains.py b/src/domains.py
index 2aa2d01..9df12f7 100644
--- a/src/domains.py
+++ b/src/domains.py
@@ -1,4 +1,8 @@
 def parent_domain(hostname):
+    # Strip trailing dot if present
+    if hostname.endswith('.'):
+        hostname = hostname[:-1]
+    
     parts = hostname.split(".")
     if len(parts) < 2:
         return ""
